title: Phase 2 - Enhancements
description: Nice-to-haves: engagement features, API, notifications, skills coach

title: Gamification & engagement features
description: Progress indicators, skill charts (radar/heatmap), badges/streaks, team trends, skill endorsements, 'last updated X months ago' nudges
close_reason: Absorbed into new epic skillsdb-ad6 (Gamification & Engagement) with detailed breakdown

title: Skills Coach (LLM-powered)
description: LLM-powered career suggestions. Parked until Laravel AI SDK is released.

title: Admin notifications for pending skills
description: Notify admins when a skill is suggested and needs approval
close_reason: Daily digest email at 8:30am with queued mailable, markdown template showing skills + suggesters

title: API Token Management UI
description: REST API for users and skills to integrate with other applications
close_reason: Added usage examples tabs (cURL, Python, Power BI) below the API tokens table

title: GET /api/users endpoint (Sanctum-protected)
description: REST API endpoint for PowerBI integration. Returns users with their skills. Protected by Sanctum token authentication. Includes tests.
close_reason: GET /api/users endpoint implemented with Sanctum auth, UserResource/SkillResource for response formatting, and dev token in seeder

title: Skills Matrix Report
description: Admin-only page showing a visual overview of team skills. Should allow filtering by skills or users to answer questions like 'Who knows Linux?' or 'What can these people do?'. Related to Excel export functionality.
close_reason: Skills Matrix Report complete - grid view, filters, and Excel export

title: Skills matrix table/grid view
description: Create the core matrix view - users as rows, skills as columns, levels shown in cells (colour-coded by level)

title: Filter by skills
description: Allow admins to filter the matrix to show only specific skills or skill categories (e.g., 'show me everyone with Linux/DevOps skills')

title: Filter by users
description: Allow admins to filter the matrix to show only specific users (e.g., 'what can Rita, Sue and Bob do?')

title: Excel export of matrix
description: Export the current matrix view (with any active filters) to Excel using SimpleSpout. This replaces/implements skillsdb-uyt.5
close_reason: Excel export implemented with filters support

title: Gamification & Engagement
description: Add useful, non-patronizing engagement features: skills dashboard with stats/insights, level-up animations, and AI portrait hook. See GAMIFICATION.md for full spec.

title: User model skill stats methods
description: Add methods to User model: getSkillDistribution() (Low/Medium/High counts), hasStaleSkills() (>4 weeks), getLastUpdatedText() (with italic 'ages ago' after 4 weeks). These feed the dashboard component.

title: Polish and test suite
description: Final polish: update TestDataSeeder with sample data for dashboard features, run pint, ensure full test suite passes. Model tests for skill distribution/stale detection, dashboard tests for stats/insights, level-up event dispatch tests.

title: Skill model trending query
description: Add getTrendingSkills() static method to Skill model. Returns skills added by multiple people recently (e.g. 'Git Actions was added by 6 people this month').

title: SkillsDashboard component - basic stats
description: New Livewire component showing: last updated text, skill distribution mini-chart (3 Low / 5 Medium / 2 High). Reusable - will be embedded on home page (personal) and admin matrix (team-wide).

title: Team insights in dashboard
description: Add team insight queries to dashboard: '4 colleagues also have Docker', 'You're one of 2 with High in Kubernetes', 'Git Actions was added by 6 people this month'. See GAMIFICATION.md for query patterns.

title: Skills over time sparkline chart
description: Add sparkline showing user's skill count over last 6 months. Will need to query pivot table timestamps to build the data series.

title: Embed dashboard on home page
description: Add <livewire:skills-dashboard /> to home-page.blade.php showing personal stats for the logged-in user.

title: Embed dashboard on admin matrix
description: Add <livewire:skills-dashboard /> to skills-matrix.blade.php in team-overview mode (no personal stats, just team-wide trends).

title: Level-up animation
description: CSS shimmer effect when user selects a higher skill level. Detect increase in SkillsEditor::updateSkillLevel(), dispatch 'level-up' browser event, Alpine listener triggers animation on skill card. Only on increases, not decreases.

title: AI portrait hook (placeholder)
description:
PLACEHOLDER ONLY - actual integration comes later. Add isEligibleForAiPortrait() to User model (updated within 1 week). Show 'AI Skill Portrait available!' callout in dashboard.

CRITICAL NOTES from prior exploration:
- Need to call an LLM to generate the image prompt, not just send skills directly to image model
- Must track recent prompts to avoid repetition
- MUST show the prompt to the user before/after generation - they may be confused or offended by results
- See image-gen project files for context
- This is just the eligibility hook - full Replicate integration is a separate future piece

title: Phase 1 - Core MVP
description: Core functionality: user skills management, admin skills management, data model
close_reason: Phase 1 Core MVP complete - data model, skills editor, admin management, user skills management, and Excel export

title: Data model (models, migrations, factories, seeder)
description: DONE: SkillLevel enum, SkillCategory, Skill, skill_user pivot, User updates
close_reason: Completed: SkillLevel enum, SkillCategory, Skill, skill_user pivot, User model updates, factories, TestDataSeeder, tests

title: HomePage and SkillsEditor components
description: Full-page HomePage (thin wrapper) + SkillsEditor component with card grid, radio pills, search/filter, suggest new skill
close_reason: Completed: HomePage, SkillsEditor with search/filter, skill levels, suggest skill modal with flyout and success toast

title: Admin skills management
description: List all skills, create, edit, delete, approve pending suggestions
close_reason: Implemented admin skills management with CRUD, approve pending, search, and requester display

title: Admin user skills management
description: View all users, manage skills for any user (for pre-filling new starters)
close_reason: Admin user skills management implemented with list view, click-through to edit, toggle defaults, and None selection fix

title: Excel export
description: Admin can download skills data as Excel using SimpleSpout
close_reason: Superseded by skillsdb-74m.4 (Excel export as part of Skills Matrix Report)
